title: Brutality - A Terramity Addon
description: Terramity addon that adds various original items as well as items from other games.
body:
This mod is an addon for **Terramity**, adding weapons and accesories from other games such as Terraria and it's mods, as well as League of Legends. There are also my original ideas as well as ideas suggested by the awesome people in the Terramity discord.

This mod aims to expand the repertoire of weapons available to be used. Items range from swords to hammers to tridents and even lances. 

This mod also adds a basic Magic System, with magic schools based on the Terramity mod's materials. There are also new curios which could augment the way you play the game.

There are also items which I found to be interesting concepts which range from altering gravity, providing alternative ways of flight as well as a rudimentary Item Enhancing system in the form of Seals.

This mod also adds a new class which is expected to be coming in the Terramity 1.0 update, the Throwing class is as you expect, a class in which you throw projectiles at enemies, with some triggering special effects.

### This mod is still in development so _expect bugs and unfinished features_.

There is a discord in which you can join for the latest development updates.

## **Better Combat is highly recommended**
